title: curriculum/NN-name/lab.json
description: Optional per-module visualization declaration: claims a stock lab and/or ships self-contained visuals/. See docs/FORMAT.md.

focus.description: One line: the live confusion this module's picture should target.

focusLab.description: Which entry the focus targets, when the module has several.

file.$comment: Inside this module's visuals/; inline CSS/JS only (served under a network-blocking CSP).

$comment: additionalProperties is open: a claimed stock lab appears as its own config key (today 'vectors', 'chunking', 'topk', 'precision-recall'), whose internal shape is the lab's own contract (study/src/lab/registry.ts), not this schema's.
